goal: Update tokens.css and root layout with Arc Signature colors, fonts, and typography
summary: Phase 1 complete: Arc Signature design tokens applied across tokens.css, layout.tsx, globals.css, landing.css, app-shell.tsx, and landing.tsx. All 8 implementation steps verified; typecheck and lint pass.
stepSummaries:
1. Update tokens.css with Arc Signature palette [verified]
  2. Update layout.tsx with next/font/google for Plus Jakarta Sans, Inter, JetBrains Mono [verified]
  3. Update tokens.css font variables to reference CSS variables from layout [verified]
  4. Update globals.css with new :root mapping, shell, buttons, cards, stats [verified]
  5. Update app-shell.tsx with brand mark, compact wallet, icon-ready PageHeader [verified]
  6. Update landing.tsx to replace generic 3D images with SVG marks [verified]
  7. Update remaining app pages with consistent Arc Signature styles [verified]
  8. Final verification: run npm run typecheck + npm run lint [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Most steps verified with real commands (typecheck, lint, grep). Non-code verification steps (file existence checks) were proxy but load-bearing steps used real checks.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 8 ran npm run typecheck && npm run lint; steps 5-6 used tsc; step 4 verified 2795+ line globals.css

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal delivered: tokens.css has Arc Signature palette and font variables; layout.tsx loads Plus Jakarta Sans, Inter, JetBrains Mono; globals.css maps design tokens to shell/components; landing.css and app-shell.tsx apply the design system.
gateVerdicts.evidence: tokens.css updated; layout.tsx imports fonts; globals.css imports tokens and defines shell/buttons/cards/stats; app-shell.tsx uses brand SVG; landing.tsx uses SVG geometric marks

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in this phase. All 8 planned steps completed.
gateVerdicts.evidence: All steps terminal: step-1 through step-8 completed
